description: [``botocore``] Adding QueryGraph operation to DataZone SDK

[``botocore``] CloudWatch Logs updates- Added support for the PutBearerTokenAuthentication API to enable or disable bearer token authentication on a log group. For more information, see CloudWatch Logs API documentation.
[``botocore``] Adds the Resold Unified Operations support plan and removes the Resold Business support plan in the CreateRelationship and UpdateRelationship APIs
[``botocore``] This release adds b300 and g7e instance types for SageMaker inference endpoints.
